_doc: Files in the Inspector app allowed to use raw color literals or non-token palette utilities. Each entry MUST include a one-line `reason`. Inspector is on a longer reconciliation path than the marketing site (see `palette_divergences:` in dependencies.yaml); tighten this list as Inspector pages adopt canonical tokens.

files.reason: Force-directed graph node fills sourced from entity-type palette; entity-type tokens not yet exposed via inline-CSS path.
